title: T-044 — UI: TEC-084 Recipe Sheet print view
prompt: Build the print-formatted recipe sheet per §7A and `bom_recipe_sheet_tab` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:551-603. Combines BOM lines + manufacturing operation sequence into a single one-pager. Provides Print button (window.print). RED tests/ui/tec-084-recipe-sheet.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-084-recipe-sheet.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Print-formatted recipe sheet; INDUSTRY-CONFIG layout variants.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use Tailwind print: utilities. Hide app chrome on print. Sheet variants per industry (Bakery/Meat/Pharma) selected by ext_jsonb.industry value (default Meat).
acceptance_criteria: Given the recipe sheet renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:551-603, then the layout (header, ingredient table, manufacturing-op steps) matches — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL with parity checklist.
Given user clicks Print, when fired, then window.print is called.
Given industry='bakery', when rendered, then Bakery-specific section labels are used.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + print invocation.
risk_red_lines: Do not show sensitive private_jsonb on print sheet.
